author: ec2-user
text: Demo web apps (map, confessions UI, dashboard) appear out of scope for this spec/rust/Zephyr workspace. No frontend/JS dashboard code present; implementation would require new web server, Leaflet integration, WebSocket bridge etc. which seems to need human decision on tech stack and repo structure. The firmware CoAP/SenML/scheduler parts for these apps have been addressed in prior work (closed 2nnd.4.3/.4/.5). Picked the 5 top ready related beads: 2nnd.4.2,2nnd.4.1,2nnd.4,2nnd.2,2nnd.1. 3 review passes completed via prior do-beads. Closed none additional this round due to scope.
